papers.title: Pioneer transcription factors direct tissue-specific cohesin chromatin entry and three-dimensional genome organization
papers.titleZh: 先驅轉錄因子引導組織特異性黏連蛋白進入染色質並調控三維基因組結構
papers.summaryZh: 本研究揭示先驅轉錄因子如何指導組織特異性的黏連蛋白載入染色質，進而建立三維基因組結構。研究發現填補了轉錄因子結合與高階染色質組織之間的關鍵缺口，闡明組織特異性基因調控的新機制。這些發現對於理解細胞命運決定與發育過程中的染色質動態變化具有重要意義，並可能為相關疾病的發生機制提供新的見解。

papers.title: Editor’s pick: Stylus Medicine
papers.abstract: Each year, Nature Biotechnology highlights companies that received sizeable early-stage funding in the previous year. Stylus Medicine is engineering novel recombinases for in vivo CAR T cell cancer therapy.

papers.title: Microglia prune developing cortical blood vessels through PD-1 signaling
papers.abstract: Visualizing microglia and blood vessels in postnatal mouse cortex reveals that microglia contact and prune vessels, which is mediated by PD-L1–PD-1 signaling.
papers.titleZh: 小膠質細胞透過PD-1訊號修剪發育中皮質血管
papers.summaryZh: 本研究首次揭示大腦中的免疫細胞——小膠質細胞——在發育過程中會主動接觸並修剪皮質血管，證實此過程由PD-L1–PD-1訊號通路所調控。研究團隊運用活體成像技術觀察出生後小鼠皮層，捕捉到小膠質細胞與血管的直接互動行為。這項發現顛覆了以往對血管發育的認知，顯示免疫系統在神經發育中扮演主動塑造的角色，而非僅僅是防禦角色。此機制的闡明有助於理解大腦微血管網絡的正常建立，並為神經發育障礙與血管相關疾病的致病機轉提供新思路。

papers.title: Innate immunity at the crossroads of protection and pathology: insights from the Aegean
papers.abstract: The 21st International Aegean Conference on Innate Immunity showcased advances that position innate immunity as a multiscale regulatory system integrating environmental, metabolic, epigenetic and genetic inputs.
papers.titleZh: 先天性免疫：保護與病理的交叉點——愛琴海會議洞見
papers.summaryZh: 第21屆國際愛琴海先天性免疫會議展示了先天免疫研究的重要進展，將先天免疫定位為整合環境、代謝、表觀遺傳及遺傳因素的多尺度調控系統。此會議匯集了全球頂尖免疫學家，探討先天免疫如何在保護宿主與引發病理之間取得平衡。這些發現挑戰了傳統上將先天免疫僅視為第一道防線的觀點，強調其在疾病發生中的複雜角色。對於過敏、自身免疫疾病及感染性疾病的理解與治療策略具有深遠影響。

papers.title: Bacillus subtilis cells can escape biofilms by producing a hydrogel that ejects them
papers.abstract: Bacillus subtilis biofilms can disperse by ejecting motile cells using osmotic pressure generated by a secreted hydrogel. This mechanism of biofilm dispersal has mechanistic parallels to a process in evolutionarily distant Cnidaria and might inform new therapeutic approaches to control biofilm dispersion.
papers.titleZh: 枯草芽孢桿菌可透過分泌水凝膠並以滲透壓彈射離開生物膜
papers.summaryZh: 枯草芽孢桿菌的生物膜可透過一種特殊機制進行分散。研究發現這些細胞會分泌一種水凝膠，透過滲透壓產生的力量將具有運動能力的細胞彈射出去，實現生物膜的脫落與分散。值得注意的是，這種生物膜分散機制與演化上距離甚遠的刺細胞動物（Cnidaria）所採用的機制具有相似之處，暗示這可能是趨同演化的結果。此發現不僅拓展了我們對生物膜動態調控的理解，更可能為開發控制生物膜分散的治療策略提供重要的參考價值。

papers.title: The primate claustrum as a hub for precision weighting of prediction errors across the cortical hierarchy
papers.abstract: Understanding how signals are exchanged across the cerebral cortex is a central challenge for theories of perception and cognition. Although crucial gaps exist in empirical knowledge, evidence is emerging in macaques for complementary functional roles of cortico-cortical and cortico-claustral-cortical loops in predictive coding and perceptual inference. This Essay puts forward a roadmap for investigating these cortical networks in the primate brain by integrating parallel neuroimaging investigation in humans with invasive electrophysiology and tracing experiments in macaques. It proposes that there are several anatomical features of the claustrum that suggest it promotes signal integration, including precision-weighting across the primate cortical hierarchy, which merits further investigation.
papers.titleZh: 靈長類屏狀核：皮層階層中預測誤差精確度加權的樞紐
papers.summaryZh: 屏狀核是大腦中一個長期被忽視的結構，本論文重新定位其在皮層訊息處理中的關鍵角色。研究提出屏狀核可能透過皮層-屏狀核-皮層迴路，參與預測編碼和知覺推理的過程。論文建議整合人類的非侵入性神經影像學與獼猴的侵入性電生理和追蹤實驗，建立跨物種的研究框架。此理論框架有助於填補皮層訊號交換機制的關鍵知識缺口，對感知與認知理論的發展具有重要意義。

papers.title: Growth-density inversion in Escherichia coli reveals superlinear, not sublinear, and density dependence
papers.abstract: Density dependence is a core principle in ecology and evolution, and yet the shape of the relationship between per capita growth and population size remains contentious. Sublinear (decelerating) density dependence has been widely reported in empirical studies, but the apparent ubiquity of sublinearity is at odds with resource competition theory. Moreover, most estimates of density dependence suffer from underappreciated statistical biases and weak inference. Using a microbial, continuous-culture approach that bypasses the limitations of conventional methods by inverting the direction of causality, we report robust evidence for superlinear (accelerating) density dependence, in agreement with theory. These results underscore the need for concerted efforts to reconcile a widening disconnect between mechanistic and phenomenological approaches to inference on the shape of density dependence. Resolving this debate has wide implications for past and future research into species coexistence and ecosystem stability, and in conservation and natural resource modelling.
papers.titleZh: 大腸桿菌生長密度關係逆轉：發現超線性而非次線性密度依賴
papers.summaryZh: 密度依賴是生態與演化學的核心原則，但學界對「每 capita 生長率與族群規模關係」的形狀一直存在爭議。過去多數實證研究支持次線性（遞減）密度依賴，但這與資源競爭理論的預測不符。本研究採用微生物連續培養法，逆轉因果方向以克服傳統方法的限制，結果發現強健的超線性（遞增）密度依賴證據，與理論預測一致。此發現凸顯了機制性與現象學推論方法之間日益擴大的鴻溝，對物種共存、生態系統穩定性研究，以及保育與自然資源建模都有深遠影響。

papers.title: The zinc-finger protein ZC3H10 suppresses type I interferon responses during viral infection by repressing interferon-stimulated gene promoters
papers.abstract: Type I interferons (IFNs) play a central role in antiviral immunity by activating the JAK-STAT signaling pathway to induce interferon-stimulated genes (ISGs). Precise regulation of this response is critical to avoid pathological inflammation and autoimmunity, but the molecular mechanisms that restrain IFN signaling remain incompletely defined. Here, we performed a human whole-genome cDNA library screen and identified ZC3H10 as a negative regulator of the type I IFN response. Overexpression of ZC3H10 suppressed ISG expression following IFNβ stimulation and increased susceptibility to infection by Newcastle disease virus, human rhinovirus 16, Enterovirus A71, and SARS-CoV-2, whereas genetic deletion of ZC3H10 enhanced ISG expression and antiviral resistance. Mechanistically, ZC3H10 required nuclear localization, a functional nucleic acid-binding domain, and its coiled-coil domain to exert its inhibitory function. Furthermore, chromatin immunoprecipitation assays revealed that ZC3H10 directly binds to the TTTC motif within ISG promoters, thereby preventing their activation. Together, these findings establish ZC3H10 as a critical negative regulator of IFN signaling that functions to balance antiviral immunity.
papers.titleZh: 鋅指蛋白ZC3H10透過抑制干擾素刺激基因啟動子 在病毒感染時抑制第一型干擾素反應
papers.summaryZh: 第一型干擾素在抗病毒免疫中扮演核心角色，透過活化JAK-STAT訊號路徑來誘導干擾素刺激基因（ISGs）的表現。本研究透過全基因體cDNA篩選，發現ZC3H10為第一型干擾素反應的負向調控因子。過度表現ZC3H10會抑制ISG表現，並增加對新城病病毒、人類鼻病毒16型、腸病毒A71及SARS-CoV-2等多種病毒的易感性；反之，刪除ZC3H10則可增強ISG表現及抗病毒能力。分子機制方面，ZC3H10需依賴其核定位、核酸結合結構域及螺旋捲曲結構域來發揮抑制功能，並直接結合ISG啟動子上的TTTC序列以阻止其活化。此研究確立ZC3H10為調控干擾素訊號、平衡抗病毒免疫的關鍵負向調節因子。

papers.title: Competing speech streams are simultaneously represented in the human cortex during attention switching
papers.abstract: Successful speech communication in multi-talker scenarios requires a skillful combination of sustained attention and rapid attention switching. While the neurophysiology literature offers detailed insights into the neural underpinnings of sustained attention, there remains considerable uncertainty on how attention switching takes place. In this study, using EEG recordings from normal-hearing adults in an immersive multi-talker environment, we measured the neural encoding of two competing speech streams amid background babble. Participants were cued to switch attention between streams every 15–30 s. Neural tracking was assessed via Temporal Response Functions (TRF), confirming reliable decoding of attentional focus. Our results indicate asymmetric disengagement and engagement processes during attention switches, where the neural tracking of the new target stream emerges before disengaging from the previous target, revealing a transient simultaneous encoding of two speech streams. That transition was closely mirrored by a reduction in EEG alpha power, informing on the cognitive effort during different phases of the attention switch. We then isolated cortical activity reflecting lexical prediction mechanisms to determine how lexical context is updated after an attention switch, comparing four context-accumulation strategies that were constructed using Large Language Models. Our findings elucidate both the temporal and contextual mechanisms underlying auditory attention shifts, pointing to the possibility that listeners carry out a reset in lexical context after switching attention. By focusing on dynamic attentional reallocation, this study offers insights into the brain’s capacity for flexible speech processing in complex listening environments.
papers.titleZh: 大腦在注意力切換時同時處理競爭語音流
papers.summaryZh: 在多人對話場景中，人們需要快速切換注意力，本研究首次揭示了這種注意力切換的神經機制。研究者使用腦電圖在沉浸式多人說話環境中測量，發現大腦在切換注意力時會同時編碼兩個語音流，而非依序處理。這個過渡過程與腦電圖alpha功率降低密切相關，反映了認知負荷的變化。研究還發現注意力切換後聽者可能會重置詞彙上下文，這對理解動態聽覺場景中的語言處理有重要意義。這些發現為未來研究聽覺注意力和語言處理的關係提供了新方向。

papers.title: The G-force in the genome: Unknowns on the functional flairs of DNA G-quadruplexes
papers.abstract: Alternative DNA secondary structures known as G-quadruplexes (G4s) form across all kingdoms of life, regulating transcription, telomere stability, and genome maintenance. Although many putative G4-forming sequences are predicted to exist, it remains unclear which ones fold in cells at any given time and what mechanisms drive their formation. Moreover, while G4s have been primarily linked to transcriptional regulation, how this function is achieved remains to be investigated, and the roles of G4s at other genomic regions remain unclear. This Unsolved Mystery discusses key gaps in our understanding of G4 formation and function and highlights recent mechanistic and methodological advances that are beginning to address them.
papers.titleZh: DNA G-四聯體：基因組調控的神秘力量
papers.summaryZh: G-四聯體（G4）是一種替代性DNA二級結構，存在於所有生物界中，調控轉錄、端粒穩定性和基因組維護。雖然許多序列被預測可形成G4，但究竟哪些會在細胞中實際摺疊、以及驅動其形成的機制仍不清楚。此外，雖然G4主要與轉錄調控相關，但其具體作用機制尚未完全闡明，其他基因組區域的G4功能也仍是未知。本篇「未解之謎」綜述了G4形成與功能研究的關鍵缺口，並探討近期方法學進展如何逐步揭示這些謎團，對於理解基因組調控機制具有重要意義。

papers.title: Predictive control of human pancreatic cell fate using a digital model of in vitro differentiation
papers.abstract: The controlled generation of mature stem cell-derived islets (SC-islets) remains a barrier to scalable cell therapy for diabetes. Here, we develop a predictive digital model defining the cell-state-specific regulatory logic governing fate specification during human SC-islet differentiation. We integrate 400,603 cells from 9 original single-cell multiomic datasets and 52 public single-cell RNA-seq and ATAC-seq datasets across 4 cell lines and 7 differentiation protocols. This model resolves transcriptional and chromatin accessibility dynamics while enabling time-resolved inference and in silico perturbation of cell-state-specific gene regulatory networks. We identify regulators across trajectories from endoderm progenitors to pancreatic exocrine and endocrine lineages, nominating new candidate regulators. Among these candidates, we validate previously unreported roles for STAT1 as an exocrine driver and ZEB1 as a dynamic regulator of early endocrine specification and later off-target serotonergic islet cell fate. This work provides an experimentally supported predictive framework and an interactive resource comprising 1,116 simulations to prioritize transcription factors and intervention windows for refining SC-islet differentiation.
papers.titleZh: 數位模型預測胰島細胞分化命運
papers.summaryZh: 糖尿病細胞療法需要大量且成熟的幹細胞衍生胰島（SC-islets），但目前體外分化效率仍待提升。本研究整合超過40萬個細胞的單細胞多體學數據，建立預測性數位模型，解析從內胚層前驅細胞到胰島細胞命運決定的調控邏輯。研究團隊驗證STAT1為外分泌細胞驅動因子，以及ZEB1在早期內分泌分化與後期異位血清素細胞命運中的動態調控角色。此框架提供1,116個模擬結果，可優先排序轉錄因子候選與干預時間點，為優化SC-islets分化protocol提供實驗依據。

papers.title: Unraveling the Comedone Switch through Single-Cell Resolution of Human Acne Lesions
papers.abstract: Acne vulgaris is one of the most prevalent inflammatory skin diseases worldwide, yet the molecular events initiating comedogenesis remain poorly understood. The comedone switch hypothesis proposes that acne originates from an imbalance in lineage commitment within the junctional zone of the pilosebaceous unit, promoting infundibular differentiation at the expense of sebaceous gland maintenance. However, direct evidence from human acne tissue at single-cell resolution has been lacking. Here, we integrated single-cell transcriptomic datasets from healthy skin, non-lesional skin of acne patients, and lesional acne tissue to reconstruct the earliest stages of comedogenesis. We identified a previously uncharacterized cell population in non-lesional skin with transcriptomic features consistent with a microcomedone and mapped this population across independent datasets to reconstruct the transcriptional comedone architecture. Comedonal remodeling was characterized by enhanced keratinization and inflammatory programs. Quantitative analyses supported a shift from sebaceous toward infundibular cell fate, providing first data-driven evidence for the comedone switch hypothesis in human acne. Beyond the pilosebaceous unit, we identified broader epithelial alterations, including loss of POSTN and ERRFI1 expression in basal interfollicular epidermal keratinocytes. Together, these findings provide a cell-resolved framework for human comedogenesis and identify candidate mechanisms linking genetic susceptibility, environmental triggers, and lineage imbalance within the upper hair follicle.
papers.titleZh: 透過單細胞解析人類痤瘡病變揭開粉刺開關之謎

papers.title: SHINE: Decoding transcriptional-metabolic microenvironments through higher-order spatial integration
papers.abstract: Spatial omics technologies are expanding to co-profile transcriptomics and metabolomics on the same tissue slide, providing complementary views of gene expression and biochemical activity to reveal molecular programs within native tissue microenvironments. However, integrating the transcriptome and metabolome remains technically challenging due to spatial misalignment, resolution disparity, and higher-order cross-modality interactions. Here, we present SHINE, a hypergraph-based computational framework for the joint analysis of spatial gene expression and metabolic networks derived from the co-profiling slide, focusing on representation learning and cross-modality interaction. Across multiple datasets, SHINE consistently outperformed existing methods for domain segmentation and biomarker co-localization and provided interpretable insights into metabolic-transcriptional microenvironments. Specifically, in Parkinson's disease mouse models, SHINE accurately delineates dopaminergic neuron-depleted regions and reconstructs coherent dopamine-associated axes. In human lung and breast cancers, SHINE resolves tumor-associated spatial regions and identifies spatially organized gene-metabolite programs associated with the tumor microenvironment. SHINE enables scalable spatial multi-omics integration across diverse biological systems.
papers.titleZh: SHINE：透過高階空間整合解碼轉錄-代謝微環境

papers.title: Site-dependent transcriptomic signatures of endometriosis are conserved across hormonal states
papers.abstract: Endometriosis, a chronic condition in which endometrial tissue grows at other sites in the body, produces lesions whose gene expression profiles vary by anatomical location and menstrual cycle stage. The extent to which these location-dependent transcriptional differences persist across hormonal states has remained unknown. Here, we compile a comprehensive single-cell RNA sequencing atlas of 672,051 cells across 112 donors from publicly available sources spanning the eutopic endometrium, menstrual effluent, ovaries, peritoneum, and ectopic endometrium from peritoneal and ovarian sites. By training machine learning classifiers on reference tissue signatures, we identify a subset of cells within ectopic lesions that retain a uterine transcriptomic identity, which we term 'core' lesion cells, and which are distinguished from surrounding host tissue populations. We show that transcriptomic differences between core lesion cells at both ectopic sites are robust across all phases of the menstrual cycle and in patients receiving exogenous hormonal therapy, and validate these findings in independent datasets. Cell type- and tissue-specific gene signatures derived from these core populations are sufficient to classify disease status and lesion subtype in independent bulk tissue data across 168 patients. These findings establish that although the core lesion cells maintain elements of eutopic endometrium identity, they also contain information about the anatomical site of the lesion. This anatomic-specificity provides a potential framework for cycle-independent endometriosis diagnosis and subtyping.
papers.titleZh: ，子宮內膜異位症的位置依賴性轉錄體特徵在荷爾蒙狀態間具保守性

papers.title: Single-cell multi-omic analyses resolve the cellular diversity of ALK/ROS1/MET/NTRK-fused gliomas in infants and older children
papers.abstract: Pediatric cancers are thought to arise from dysregulation of developmental programs, otherwise tightly regulated in time and space. Infant-type hemispheric gliomas (IHGs) arise in early childhood, driven by characteristic ALK/ROS1/MET/NTRK receptor tyrosine kinase (RTK) gene fusions. We dissected the cellular hierarchies of 24 fusion-positive gliomas, spanning infants through adolescents, using single-cell and single-nucleus RNA/ATAC-seq, and spatial transcriptomics. We identified five cancer cell states, with radial glia-like cells at the apex of a neoplastic hierarchy resembling neuronal- and glial-like trajectories. Neuronal-like cells were enriched in most IHGs but diminished in ROS1-fused IHGs and older patients. Integration of chromatin profiling revealed FOS/JUN-driven oncogenic programs and high inferred plasticity across all cancer cell populations. Myeloid cells, the most abundant non-neoplastic population, comprised distinct subgroups, suggesting context-dependent functions. Despite lacking high-order structure, spatial transcriptomics revealed discrete cellular niches within IHGs. Collectively, our findings elucidate the cellular states and developmental programs underlying IHGs and RTK-fused gliomas in older patients, opening new avenues for research and therapy innovation.
papers.titleZh: 單細胞多體學分析解析嬰兒及較大兒童ALK/ROS1/MET/NTRK融合神經膠質瘤的細胞多樣性

papers.title: A cinnamyl alcohol dehydrogenase–like scaffold organizes monoterpenoid indole alkaloid biosynthesis
papers.abstract: Biosynthesis of ~3,000 monoterpenoid indole alkaloids (MIAs), including the anticancer drug vinblastine, involves the highly unstable intermediate strictosidine aglycone. Its formation by strictosidine β-glucosidase (SGD) and subsequent conversion by geissoschizine synthase (GS) occur in spatially separated compartments, representing a major biosynthesis bottleneck. Here we discover VinBLAST, a cinnamyl alcohol dehydrogenase–like protein repurposed as a scaffold for efficient processing of this labile intermediate. VinBLAST physically mediates SGD and GS interaction in the nucleus and allosterically enhances GS catalytic efficiency. VinBLAST homologs from diverse plant families enhance biosynthesis of several representative MIAs, with the production of catharanthine increased to ~160 mg L −1 in yeast, nearly 1,000-fold higher than previous studies. Our discovery provides a missing link in organizing MIA biosynthesis and enables scalable bioproduction of geissoschizine-derived therapeutics.
papers.titleZh: 肉桂醇脫氫酶樣蛋白質架構單萜吲哚生物鹼生合成
papers.summaryZh: 單萜吲哚生物鹼（MIA）包含長春花鹼等重要抗癌藥物，其生合成途徑中存在關鍵瓶頸。本研究發現 VinBLAST，一種被重新利用的肉桂醇脫氫酶樣蛋白，可作為支架促進不穩定中間產物的處理。VinBLAST 在細胞核中介導兩種關鍵酶的相互作用，並顯著增強其催化效率。在酵母中達到約 160 mg/L 的文多靈前驅物產量，較先前研究提升近千倍。此發現為 MIA 生合成途徑提供了關鍵的組織連結，並為相關治療藥物的規模化生物製造開闢新途徑。

papers.title: De novo design of orthogonal far-red, orange, and green fluorophore-binding proteins for multiplexed imaging
papers.abstract: Fluorescent proteins and small-molecule dyes offer complementary advantages for biological imaging: proteins are amenable to genetic tagging, whereas dyes provide superior brightness and photostability. To combine these strengths, we used de novo protein design to generate small, nanomolar-affinity, high-selectivity binders (NovoTags) for three cell-permeable dyes spanning the visible spectrum. We show that the NovoTag fluorescent lifetimes can be tuned and demonstrate their application in lifetime and wavelength-based multiplexed fluorescence imaging. We further design a two-chain NovoTag that functions as a chemically induced dimerization system with fluorescent readout in living cells, or as a minimally perturbing proximity probe in fixed cells. Our approach combines the advantages of fluorescent proteins and small-molecule dyes, expanding the toolkit for cellular imaging.
papers.titleZh: 從頭設計遠紅、橙、綠三色螢光結合蛋白 開創多重螢光成像新工具
papers.summaryZh: 螢光蛋白與小分子染料各有優勢：蛋白質可基因標記，染料則亮度更高、光穩定性更佳。本研究利用從頭蛋白質設計技術，開發出三種可結合不同波長細胞通透性染料的小型高親和力結合蛋白（NovoTags），成功結合兩者優點。這些 NovoTags 的螢光壽命可調控，能同時應用於壽命與波長多重螢光成像。此外，雙鏈 NovoTags 还可作為化學誘導二聚系統或固定細胞中的近端探針，進一步擴展其應用範圍。

paper.title: AI is set to completely transform cybersecurity — here’s how researchers must prepare
A global capital for AI safety is emerging — and it's not in Silicon Valley
US politicians push agencies to restrict research collaboration with China
Will making ‘replication studies’ easier to find help science self-correct?
Preferred synthesis of armchair transition metal dichalcogenide nanotubes
Helium escaping from the atmosphere of a nearby rocky exoplanet orbiting in a habitable zone
